bull: Top-line momentum — revenue grew +32.2% YoY in FY2026 Q1 to $1.01B, with TTM revenue of $3.67B confirming the run-rate. Margin trajectory — net margin expanded +2.0pp over the last 4 quarters in the dataset. Management's cost-out commentary on recent calls is showing up in the P&L, not just the press release.

Options market complacent — front-month implied move of just 5.1% suggests the market is not pricing in a binary outcome at the next print. Asymmetric setup if the company delivers a positive surprise — limited downside priced, full upside available.
bear: Margin pressure — net margin of 5.2% in the latest quarter is below the 10% benchmark that gates discretionary capital deployment for most large-caps. Either pricing power is eroding or input costs are running ahead of pass-through.
Momentum stretched — RSI at 89 in overbought territory. Near-term mean-reversion risk elevated; consider waiting for a pullback toward the 50-DMA ($141.25) before adding.
52-week extension — at 97% of the 52-week range, the stock is one bad print away from a 10–15% reset back into the middle of the range. Position size accordingly.
